turns.user_message: I got quiet in a group chat earlier, which is new for me. I just felt like I had nothing worthwhile to add.
I find myself holding back in conversations all the time now. I'm convinced my thoughts aren't interesting enough to share.
I feel completely invisible in any room I walk into, like my presence adds nothing. It's a hollow, lonely feeling that just sticks with me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment. This used to not bother the speaker.
